'''fatoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockmackie|dockmackie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockmackie|dockmackie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fatoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæteyeth|fæteyeth]] || [[word:fæteyej|fæteyej]] || [[word:fæteyesh|fæteyesh]] || [[word:fæteye|fæteye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatotoyoth|fatotoyoth]] || [[word:fatotoyoj|fatotoyoj]] || [[word:fatotoyosh|fatotoyosh]] || [[word:fatotoyo|fatotoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatoyoth|fatoyoth]] || [[word:fatoyoj|fatoyoj]] || [[word:fatoyosh|fatoyosh]] || [[word:fatoyo|fatoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatofyoth|fatofyoth]] || [[word:fatofyoj|fatofyoj]] || [[word:fatofyosh|fatofyosh]] || [[word:fatofyof|fatofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatoyotho|fatoyotho]] || [[word:fatoyojo|fatoyojo]] || [[word:fatoyosho|fatoyosho]] || [[word:fatoyoko|fatoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatoyoth|fatoyoth]] || [[word:fatoyoj|fatoyoj]] || [[word:fatoyosh|fatoyosh]] || [[word:fatoyo|fatoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatoyothol|fatoyothol]] || [[word:fatoyojol|fatoyojol]] || [[word:fatoyoshol|fatoyoshol]] || [[word:fatoyokol|fatoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatoyothotho|fatoyothotho]] || [[word:fatoyojojo|fatoyojojo]] || [[word:fatoyoshosho|fatoyoshosho]] || [[word:fatoyoko|fatoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatoyothon|fatoyothon]] || [[word:fatoyojon|fatoyojon]] || [[word:fatoyoshon|fatoyoshon]] || [[word:fatoyokon|fatoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatoyothoro|fatoyothoro]] || [[word:fatoyojoro|fatoyojoro]] || [[word:fatoyoshoro|fatoyoshoro]] || [[word:fatoyokoro|fatoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
